description: Single source of truth for all calibratable parameters in the AVRI + RV scoring pipeline. Pipeline SQL and dashboard both consume this. v2.0 introduces RV (Realized Value).

weights._note: Must sum to 1.0. Calibration in v3 candidate: regress against renewal outcomes; expected to vary by segment.

floor_rule._note: If TH < threshold, AVRI capped at avri_cap. Expresses non-substitutability — tech crisis can't be averaged away by consumption.

color_thresholds._note: AVRI >= green: Green. >= yellow and < green: Yellow. < yellow: Red. Onboarding (NULL AVRI) is its own color, see grace_period.

cr_pillar._description: Commit Realization. 90-day consumed credits / (3 * monthly_commit). Piecewise scoring curve.

um_pillar._description: Usage Momentum. 90-day avg / 365-day avg. Catches spike-and-drop. Level guard zeros UM if cumulative annual usage < 5% of commit (prevents tiny ratios from passing the test).

level_guard._note: If 365d cumulative < 5% of (12 * monthly_commit), UM forced to 0. Stops ratio from looking healthy when both numerator and denominator are tiny.

dm_pillar._description: Deployment Maturity. Active days in last 90 / 90.

th_pillar._description: Technical Health. Exponentially decayed health color over a sliding window.

grace_period._description: v1.3 Activation Grace. New contracts excluded from CR/UM denominators until they activate by usage OR by time.
grace_period._note: Activates if cumulative usage >= 15% of monthly_commit OR contract age >= 90 days, whichever first.

rv_formula._description: Realized Value. Linear v1: RV = ARR * AVRI/100. Decomposes cleanly across pillars and aggregates.
_v3_candidates: Quadratic (ARR * (AVRI/100)^2) — convex; would penalize mediocrity disproportionately. Needs renewal data to defend.
Sigmoidal (logistic in AVRI) — empirical fit standard for churn modeling. Two parameters (k, inflection).

naive_chs._description: Approximation of Gainsight-style composite for comparison purposes only. Not used in production scoring.
